loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

text_date.text: ประชุมวันที่

director_1.text: มอบหมายให้

combo.combo_approve_name: select sc_hr_off_member.official_no as item_code ,pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name(official_no) as item_desc from sc_hr_off_member ,sc_hr_ucf_official_position where sc_hr_off_member.official_position = sc_hr_ucf_official_position.official_position and sc_hr_ucf_official_position.approve_loan_status = '1'

root.sql:
select ( select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name ,( select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract, 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as begining_of_contract_date ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date, 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as requestment_tdate
,'!text_1!' as text ,'!text_set_1!' as text_set --ชุดที่ ,'!second_time_1!' as second_time --ครั้งที่ , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!text_date_1!', 'DAYที่ SD MONTH YYYY') as text_date --เมื่อวันที่ , pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!treasurer_name_1!' ) as treasurer_name , pka_hr.fp_get_hr_name( '!director_1!' ) as director_name
,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as member_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,( select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) as loan_type_description ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount
,coalesce(( select sum(principal_balance_of_loan) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and (sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' or sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_focus = '1') ),0) as principal_amount
,coalesce(( select sum(interest_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and (sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' or sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_focus = '1') ),0) as interest_amount
,coalesce(( select sum(principal_balance_of_loan + interest_amount) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and (sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' or sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_focus = '1') ),0) as total_clr
,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date,'DD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status
from sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract = '20/06/2024' --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = '03776' order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no
